title: Meta Microdigital
tagline: Web and marketing for a digital-first company.
description: Meta Microdigital partnered with Verience for web development and digital marketing — fast iterations and thoughtful design that matches how they show up in market.
contentPreview: Meta Microdigital needed a partner who could move quickly without sacrificing quality. We built their web presence and supported ongoing marketing efforts.
From site structure to campaign creative, every deliverable was shaped to help them stand out in a competitive digital landscape.
